in India

March 2026 · Mumbai & Delhi

An immersion Tour, typically for a delegation of CIOs, Investment Consultants, Family Offices, Wealth Advice Practitioners — featuring Government Advisers, Regulators, Strategists, Investment Advisers, Corporate Management and Company Founders. The Tour is an unfiltered "Grassroots" experience of what drives India's growth story, today and over the next decades. It is a must attend for those building growth portfolios for their clients.

About the Series

About the Grassroots
India Tour

The Grassroots India Tour is India Avenue's signature investor experience — an exclusive, on-the-ground program designed to give Australian investors unparalleled access to India's business landscape. Tour VI brought together a select group of delegates for a series of high-level meetings with leading fund managers, policymakers, and corporate leaders across Mumbai and New Delhi.

From conversations with the Reserve Bank of India and NITI Aayog to one-on-one sessions with top-tier portfolio companies, the tour delivered the kind of qualitative conviction that no research report can replicate.

Tour VI Written Summary

Download the Tour VI Summary Report

Key themes, company takeaways & market observations — a detailed overview of what our March 2026 delegation encountered across Mumbai and Delhi, including sector insights, macro policy developments, and what it means for your portfolio.

What Tour VI Covered

Mumbai & Delhi · March 2026
01

Direct Company Meetings

Unmediated access to senior management at listed and unlisted Indian companies across key growth sectors.

02

Policy & Regulatory Insight

Discussions with policy makers, regulators and industry bodies on India's evolving investment landscape.

03

On-the-Ground Context

Site visits, infrastructure observations and lived experiences that no research report can replicate.

04

Curated Delegation

A small group of financial advisers, CIOs, family offices and HNW investors — ensuring meaningful peer dialogue.

05

India Avenue Expertise

Guided throughout by the India Avenue investment team, with deep in-market relationships built over many years.

06

Peer Network

Structured and informal opportunities to connect with like-minded investors who share conviction in India's growth.

Delegation places are capped — early expressions of interest are prioritised
